# Refund Policy

## Overview

At TechCorp, we stand behind our products. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, we offer a comprehensive refund policy to ensure your peace of mind.

## Eligibility

Refunds are available for products purchased within the last 30 days. To be eligible for a refund, the item must be unused, in its original packaging, and in the same condition that you received it. Digital products (software licenses, subscriptions) are eligible for refund within 14 days of purchase if less than 20% of the content has been accessed.

## Process

To initiate a refund, contact our support team at support@techcorp.com with your order number and reason for the return. Our team will review your request within 2 business days and provide a return shipping label if applicable.

Once we receive the returned item, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. The refund will be credited to the original payment method. For credit card payments, please allow an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.

## Exceptions

The following items are not eligible for refund:
- Customized or personalized products
- Clearance items marked as "Final Sale"
- Gift cards and store credit
- Products damaged by the customer
- Items purchased more than 30 days ago

## Partial Refunds

In some cases, we may offer a partial refund:
- Items returned after 30 days but within 60 days receive a 75% refund
- Products with minor damage may receive a 50-90% refund depending on condition
- Opened software with more than 20% usage receives a prorated refund

## Contact

For questions about our refund policy, please contact:
- Email: support@techcorp.com
- Phone: 1-800-TECHCORP (1-800-832-4267)
- Live Chat: Available Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM EST

**Lessons Learned:** Post-incident review within 48 hours, published to affected customers

### Security Contact

Report security vulnerabilities to security@techcorp.com. We operate a bug bounty program with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities. We commit to acknowledging reports within 24 hours and providing a resolution timeline within 72 hours.

## Network Security

- DDoS protection via Cloudflare Enterprise
- Web Application Firewall (WAF) with custom rule sets
- Network segmentation between production, staging, and development environments
- VPN access required for all internal systems
- Regular penetration testing by NCC Group (quarterly)

# TechCorp Security Guide

## Data Protection

TechCorp implements multiple layers of security to protect your data:

### Encryption

- **At rest:** All data is encrypted using AES-256-GCM. Encryption keys are managed by AWS KMS with automatic key rotation every 90 days.
- **In transit:** All connections use TLS 1.3. We enforce HSTS with a minimum age of one year. Certificate pinning is available for mobile applications.
- **Application-level:** Sensitive fields (API keys, passwords, PII) are additionally encrypted with envelope encryption before storage.

### Access Control

TechCorp uses a Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model with the following default roles:

| Role | Permissions |
|------|------------|
| Viewer | Read-only access to dashboards and reports |
| Operator | Viewer + ability to manage instances and alerts |
| Admin | Operator + user management and billing |
| Owner | Full access including API key management and account deletion |

Custom roles can be created with granular permissions. All role changes are logged in the audit trail.

### Audit Logging

Every action in the TechCorp Platform is logged with:
- Timestamp (UTC)
- User ID and IP address
- Action performed
- Resource affected
- Result (success/failure)

Audit logs are retained for 2 years and can be exported via the API or downloaded from the Dashboard. Logs are immutable and tamper-evident using cryptographic chaining.

## Compliance

TechCorp maintains the following certifications and compliance standards:

- **SOC 2 Type II** — Audited annually by Deloitte
- **ISO 27001** — Information security management
- **GDPR** — Full compliance for EU data subjects
- **HIPAA** — Available for healthcare customers (requires BAA)
- **PCI DSS Level 1** — For customers processing payment data

## Incident Response

Our incident response process follows the NIST framework:

1. **Detection:** Automated monitoring with <5 minute detection time for critical issues
2. **Containment:** Affected systems are isolated within 15 minutes
3. **Eradication:** Root cause analysis and remediation within 4 hours
4. **Recovery:** Service restoration with full data integrity verification
5. **Lessons Learned:** Post-incident review within 48 hours, published to affected customers

### Security Contact

Report security vulnerabilities to security@techcorp.com. We operate a bug bounty program with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities

# Product Specifications

## TechCorp Pro Laptop (Model TC-2026)

### Hardware Specifications

| Component | Specification |
|-----------|--------------|
| Processor | Intel Core i9-14900K, 24 cores, 5.8GHz boost |
| Memory | 64GB DDR5-5600 (2x32GB, expandable to 128GB) |
| Storage | 2TB NVMe PCIe 5.0 SSD |
| Display | 16" Mini-LED, 3456x2234, 120Hz, P3 wide color |
| Graphics | NVIDIA RTX 5090 Mobile, 16GB GDDR7 |
| Battery | 100Wh lithium-polymer, up to 18 hours |
| Weight | 2.14 kg (4.72 lbs) |
| Ports | 3x Thunderbolt 5, 1x HDMI 2.1, 1x SD card reader, 1x 3.5mm audio |

### Software

The TC-2026 ships with TechCorp OS 5.0, which includes:
- Built-in AI assistant powered by on-device LLM
- Automatic cloud backup with 1TB included storage
- TechCorp Suite (word processor, spreadsheet, presentation)
- Security suite with real-time threat protection

### Connectivity

- WiFi 7 (802.11be) with tri-band support
- Bluetooth 5.4
- Optional 5G cellular module (add $199)
- NFC for quick device pairing

### Warranty

All TC-2026 units come with a standard 2-year warranty covering manufacturing defects. Extended warranty options:
- 3-year coverage: $149
- 5-year coverage with accidental damage: $349
- Enterprise fleet pricing available for orders of 50+ units

### Performance Benchmarks

In independent testing (TechReview Labs, March 2026):
- Cinebench R24: Multi-core score of 42,500
- 3DMark Time Spy: 28,400
- PCMark 10: 8,950
- Battery life (video playback): 16.5 hours
- Battery life (web browsing): 14.2 hours
- SSD sequential read: 14,500 MB/s
- SSD sequential write: 12,800 MB/s

# TechCorp API Reference

## Authentication

All API requests require authentication via Bearer token. Include your API key in the Authorization header:

```
Authorization: Bearer tc_live_abc123xyz
```

API keys can be generated from the TechCorp Dashboard under Settings > API Keys. Each key has configurable permissions and rate limits.

## Rate Limits

| Plan | Requests/minute | Requests/day |
|------|----------------|--------------|
| Free | 60 | 1,000 |
| Pro | 600 | 50,000 |
| Enterprise | 6,000 | Unlimited |

Rate limit headers are included in every response:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Maximum requests per minute
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`: Remaining requests in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`: Unix timestamp when the window resets

## Endpoints

### GET /api/v2/instances

List all cloud instances managed by TechCorp.

**Parameters:**
- `region` (optional): Filter by region (e.g., `us-east-1`, `eu-west-1`)
- `status` (optional): Filter by status (`running`, `stopped`, `terminated`)
- `page` (optional, default: 1): Page number for pagination
- `per_page` (optional, default: 50, max: 200): Results per page

**Response:**
```json
{
  "data": [
    {
      "id": "inst_abc123",
      "name": "web-server-prod-01",
      "type": "c5.2xlarge",
      "region": "us-east-1",
      "status": "running",
      "monthly_cost": 245.50,
      "cpu_utilization": 0.42,
      "created_at": "2026-01-15T08:30:00Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "page": 1,
    "per_page": 50,
    "total": 234,
    "total_pages": 5
  }
}
```

### POST /api/v2/instances/{id}/optimize

Run cost optimization analysis on a specific instance.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "instance_id": "inst_abc123",
  "current_cost": 245.50,
  "recommended_type": "c5.xlarge",
  "projected_cost": 122.75,
  "s

# TechCorp Company History

## Founding (2015)

TechCorp was founded in 2015 by Sarah Chen and Marcus Williams in a garage in Austin, Texas. The company started as a small consultancy helping businesses integrate cloud computing solutions. With just $50,000 in seed funding from friends and family, the founders built their first product: a cloud migration tool that automated the process of moving on-premise applications to AWS.

## Early Growth (2016-2018)

In 2016, TechCorp secured $2 million in Series A funding from Horizon Ventures. This allowed the company to hire its first 15 employees and move to a proper office space in downtown Austin. The cloud migration tool gained traction with mid-market companies, reaching 200 paying customers by the end of 2017.

By 2018, TechCorp had expanded its product line to include a monitoring dashboard and a cost optimization tool for cloud infrastructure. Revenue reached $8 million, and the team grew to 45 employees. The company also opened a second office in San Francisco to be closer to the tech ecosystem.

## Scale-Up Phase (2019-2021)

The COVID-19 pandemic in 2020 accelerated cloud adoption worldwide, and TechCorp was perfectly positioned to benefit. Revenue jumped from $15 million in 2019 to $42 million in 2020. The company raised a $30 million Series B round led by Sequoia Capital.

In 2021, TechCorp launched its flagship product: TechCorp Platform, an integrated suite of cloud management tools. The platform combined migration, monitoring, cost optimization, and security into a single dashboard. This was a turning point for the company, as enterprise customers began replacing multiple point solutions with TechCorp's unified platform.

## AI Pivot (2022-2024)

Recognizing the transformative potential of large language models, TechCorp made a strategic pivot in 2022. The company invested heavily in AI capabilities, hiring a team of 30 ML engineers and researchers. By 2023, TechCorp had integrated AI into its platform, offering intelligent cost recommendations, automated incident response, and natural language querying of infrastructure metrics.

The AI features drove rapid growth: revenue hit $120 million in 2023 and $210 million in 2024. TechCorp raised a $150 million Series C round at a $2.1 billion valuation, officially becoming a unicorn.

# Refund Policy

## Overview

At TechCorp, we stand behind our products. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, we offer a comprehensive refund policy to ensure your peace of mind.

## Eligibility

Refunds are available for products purchased within the last 30 days. To be eligible for a refund, the item must be unused, in its original packaging, and in the same condition that you received it. Digital products (software licenses, subscriptions) are eligible for refund within 14 days of purchase if less than 20% of the content has been accessed.

## Process

To initiate a refund, contact our support team at support@techcorp.com with your order number and reason for the return. Our team will review your request within 2 business days and provide a return shipping label if applicable.

Once we receive the returned item, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. The refund will be credited to the original payment method. For credit card payments, please allow an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.

## Exceptions

The following items are not eligible for refund:
- Customized or personalized products
- Clearance items marked as "Final Sale"
- Gift cards and store credit
- Products damaged by the customer
- Items purchased more than 30 days ago

## Partial Refunds

In some cases, we may offer a partial refund:
- Items returned after 30 days but within 60 days receive a 75% refund
- Products with minor damage may receive a 50-90% refund depending on condition
- Opened software with more than 20% usage receives a prorated refund

## Contact

For questions about our refund policy, please contact:
- Email: support@techcorp.com
- Phone: 1-800-TECHCORP (1-800-832-4267)
- Live Chat: Available Monday-Friday, 9AM-6PM EST

**Lessons Learned:** Post-incident review within 48 hours, published to affected customers

### Security Contact

Report security vulnerabilities to security@techcorp.com. We operate a bug bounty program with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities. We commit to acknowledging reports within 24 hours and providing a resolution timeline within 72 hours.

## Network Security

- DDoS protection via Cloudflare Enterprise
- Web Application Firewall (WAF) with custom rule sets
- Network segmentation between production, staging, and development environments
- VPN access required for all internal systems
- Regular penetration testing by NCC Group (quarterly)

# TechCorp Security Guide

## Data Protection

TechCorp implements multiple layers of security to protect your data:

### Encryption

- **At rest:** All data is encrypted using AES-256-GCM. Encryption keys are managed by AWS KMS with automatic key rotation every 90 days.
- **In transit:** All connections use TLS 1.3. We enforce HSTS with a minimum age of one year. Certificate pinning is available for mobile applications.
- **Application-level:** Sensitive fields (API keys, passwords, PII) are additionally encrypted with envelope encryption before storage.

### Access Control

TechCorp uses a Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model with the following default roles:

| Role | Permissions |
|------|------------|
| Viewer | Read-only access to dashboards and reports |
| Operator | Viewer + ability to manage instances and alerts |
| Admin | Operator + user management and billing |
| Owner | Full access including API key management and account deletion |

Custom roles can be created with granular permissions. All role changes are logged in the audit trail.

### Audit Logging

Every action in the TechCorp Platform is logged with:
- Timestamp (UTC)
- User ID and IP address
- Action performed
- Resource affected
- Result (success/failure)

Audit logs are retained for 2 years and can be exported via the API or downloaded from the Dashboard. Logs are immutable and tamper-evident using cryptographic chaining.

## Compliance

TechCorp maintains the following certifications and compliance standards:

- **SOC 2 Type II** — Audited annually by Deloitte
- **ISO 27001** — Information security management
- **GDPR** — Full compliance for EU data subjects
- **HIPAA** — Available for healthcare customers (requires BAA)
- **PCI DSS Level 1** — For customers processing payment data

## Incident Response

Our incident response process follows the NIST framework:

1. **Detection:** Automated monitoring with <5 minute detection time for critical issues
2. **Containment:** Affected systems are isolated within 15 minutes
3. **Eradication:** Root cause analysis and remediation within 4 hours
4. **Recovery:** Service restoration with full data integrity verification
5. **Lessons Learned:** Post-incident review within 48 hours, published to affected customers

### Security Contact

Report security vulnerabilities to security@techcorp.com. We operate a bug bounty program with rewards up to $50,000 for critical vulnerabilities

- Built-in AI assistant powered by on-device LLM
- Automatic cloud backup with 1TB included storage
- TechCorp Suite (word processor, spreadsheet, presentation)
- Security suite with real-time threat protection

### Connectivity

- WiFi 7 (802.11be) with tri-band support
- Bluetooth 5.4
- Optional 5G cellular module (add $199)
- NFC for quick device pairing

- Cinebench R24: Multi-core score of 42,500

| Plan | Requests/minute | Requests/day |
|------|----------------|--------------|
| Free | 60 | 1,000 |
| Pro | 600 | 50,000 |

- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Maximum requests per minute

  "recommended_type": "c5.xlarge",
  "projected_cost": 122.75,

# Refund Policy

## Overview

At TechCorp, we stand behind our products. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, we offer a comprehensive refund policy to ensure your peace of mind.

## Eligibility

Refunds are available for products purchased within the last 30 days. To be eligible for a refund, the item must be unused, in its original packaging, and in the same condition that you received it. Digital products (software licenses, subscriptions) are eligible for refund within 14 days of purchase if less than 20% of the content has been accessed.

## Process

To initiate a refund, contact our support team at support@techcorp.com with your order number and reason for the return. Our team will review your request within 2 business days and provide a return shipping label if applicable.

Once we receive the returned item, refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. The refund will be credited to the original payment method. For credit card payments, please allow an additional 3-5 business days for the refund to appear on your statement.

## Exceptions

The following items are not eligible for refund:
- Customized or personalized products
- Clearance items marked as "Final Sale"
- Gift cards and store credit
- Products damaged by the customer
- Items purchased more than 30 days ago

## Partial Refunds

In some cases, we may offer a partial refund:
- Items returned after 30 days but within 60 days receive a 75% refund
- Products with minor damage may receive a 50-90% refund depending on condition
- Opened software with more than 20% usage receives a prorated refund
